# Test Database

## Purpose

This directory contains the platform test database used by
Database Layer, Collector, Telemetry, FastAPI, and
integration testing.

Unlike the production database, this database is rebuilt
from test data before each test run.

## Source Data

The test database is generated from:

data/
├── metadata/
├── probes/
└── raw/

These JSON files are considered the single source of truth
for all platform tests.

## Generated File

test_archive.db

The database is automatically generated by:

build_test_database.py

It should not be manually edited.

## Test Workflow

Delete old database

↓

Create SQLite database

↓

Create database schema

↓

Load measurement metadata

↓

Load probe information

↓

Load raw observations

↓

Normalize observations

↓

Insert into SQLite

↓

Run pytest

↓

Run shell tests
